Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Continued To Nov-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey for George Manning (Administrator).

Ms. Espey stated that she spoke with the Realtor on Friday, that they have done most of the painting, that they need to repair the roof and do the floors, that they have Stagers coming in on September 10th and that they hope to have the property on the market by September 15th. Ms. Espey also stated that the Realtor's goal is to show the property for a few weeks and receive some offers, that the Beneficiaries would not be able to handle the sale and that the Family is relying on the Administrator to sell the property. The Second Report on Status of Administration is continued to November 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Continued To Jul-01-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey for George Manning (Administrator).

Ms. Espey stated that Mr. Manning has selected a Realtor, that they should be getting the house listed by the end of June and asked for a four month continuance to get a final petition filed. The Court informed Ms. Espey that the best thing to do is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Ms. Espey stated that she had one, but Mr. Manning's Brother fell ill and he wasn't available to sign it. Status on close of estate is continued to July 1, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Espey to file either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
